channel.title: GitHub Trending - Nuovi in C++ (Monthly)
channel.description: Repository (Nuovi) più popolari in C++ nel periodo monthly.

item.title: 📝 memovai/mimiclaw (3802 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: memovai

📝 Repository: memovai/mimiclaw

📄 Descrizione: MimiClaw: Run OpenClaw on a $5 chip. No OS(Linux). No Node.js. No Mac mini. No Raspberry Pi. No VPS. Hardware agents OS.

⭐ Stelle: 3802

🍴 Forks: 518

💻 Linguaggio: C

🏷️ Topics: ai assistant clawdbot edge-ai-agents memory openclaw

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-04T04:25:33Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-05T04:05:32Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.title: 📝 tnm/zclaw (1739 ⭐)
item.description:
👤 Owner: tnm

📝 Repository: tnm/zclaw

📄 Descrizione: Your personal AI assistant at all-in 888KiB (~35KB in app code). Running on an ESP32. GPIO, cron, custom tools, memory, and more.

⭐ Stelle: 1739

🍴 Forks: 138

💻 Linguaggio: C

📜 Licenza: MIT License

⏰ Creato il: 2026-02-16T19:52:01Z

🔄 Ultimo Aggiornamento: 2026-03-06T03:30:18Z

Visita il Repository su GitHub

]]>

item.description:
👤 Owner: enjector

📝 Repository: enjector/microgpt-c

📄 Descrizione: Zero-dependency C99 GPT-2 engine for edge AI. Sub-1M parameter models train on-device in seconds. Organelle Pipeline Architecture (OPA) coordinates specialised micro-models — 91% win rates on 11 logic games with 30K–160K parameters. Composition beats capacity.

🍴 Forks: 6
